series_metadata.series_description: This series includes, but is not limited to, local elections official results; approved ballot language for any local question or issue transmitted by county boards of elections per R.C. 3501.11; report forms; resolutions/ordinances; and miscellaneous supporting documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: hard copies two (2) years ; Electronic: Resolutions, ballot language and official results be scanned and scans kept permanently
